---
name: Source or Factual Correction
about: Report an incorrect citation, outdated framework, or factual issue
title: "[Correction] "
labels: ["correction", "sources"]
assignees: []
---

## What Needs Correction
Describe the current statement, citation, or section.

## Location
Provide file path and section heading.

## Proposed Correction
What should be updated?

## Supporting Source
Include a trusted source URL or citation.

## Urgency
- Low (quality improvement)
- Medium (important factual update)
- High (risk of cultural or legal harm)
